name: The Dawning Clocks Of Time - Director's Cut
short_description: A classic story of love, war and betrayal on an intergalatic scale. A epic turn based RPG with both sandbox and linear story progression. Take up arms with energy and exciting weapons and skills for the battle of the ages, who will decide the fate for all of humanity? Director's Cut version!
detailed_description:
Just Updated

The Dawning Clocks of Time now fully supports the majority of game controllers, including Xbox, Playstation, Logitech and more!


About the Game

An "indie gem" - a unique game based on the novel by screenwriter, Jake Stephen Jackson - brought to life in a brand new experience. Sven, Kate and Chariot are characters you will never forget as they join you on your quest throughout the Milky Way Galaxy to bring an end to the Progenitor War.

New! For game preservation purposes, we've updated the game to include the 'Director's Cut' materials, that was cut from the planned Remaster before we released REMAKE. Director's Cut is future proofed to run on Windows 11 24H2 and beyond by using Voodoo wrapper and we have replaced the incompatible engine that the original game was using before.

With whole new areas and cinematic animated backdrops that resemble the Remake, this is the definitive version of The Dawning Clocks of Time (Original).
